examples: He passed out during the ceremony.
They passed out samples to customers.
She passed out the exam papers.
Volunteers passed out food to the homeless.
They passed out flyers on the street.
He passed out brochures at the event.
She passed out from the heat.
I almost passed out from exhaustion.
The patient passed out after the injection.
example_translate: Он потерял сознание во время церемонии.
Я почти потерял сознание от истощения.
pass out.synonyms:
Терять сознание - faint, black out, collapse
Раздавать, распространять - distribute, hand out
